spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: Three glowing darts of magical force strike your target unerringly.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.description: A wave of healing energy washes over you, mending wounds.

spells.name: Shield
spells.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: A bright streak of flame erupts into a 20-foot radius explosion.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description: A stroke of lightning forming a line 100 feet long and 5 feet wide blasts out.

spells.name: Cure Serious Wounds
spells.description: Powerful healing magic knits flesh and bone.

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: The target moves and acts with supernatural speed.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.description: Lightning springs from your hand to deliver a shock.

spells.name: Ice Storm
spells.description: Pounding hail hammers a 20-foot radius area and makes it difficult terrain.

spells.name: Stoneskin
spells.description: Your flesh becomes as hard as stone. Resistance to nonmagical weapons.

spells.name: Mass Cure Wounds
spells.description: A wave of healing energy washes over up to 6 creatures in range.

spells.name: Cone of Cold
spells.description: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands in a 60-foot cone.

spells.name: Flame Strike
spells.description: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens.

spells.name: Bless
spells.description: Divine favor aids the target's attacks and saving throws.

spells.name: Hold Person
spells.description: The target is paralyzed and incapacitated.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.description: A thin sheet of flames shoots forth from your outstretched fingertips.

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.description: You hurl a bubble of acid at one creature. On a hit, deals acid damage.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature, slowing it.

spells.name: Darkness
spells.description: Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose, blocking all light.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.description: You turn invisible until you attack or cast a spell.

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.description: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear, confusing attackers.

spells.name: Scorching Ray
spells.description: You hurl three rays of fire at a target. Each ray deals fire damage.

spells.name: Web
spells.description: Thick sticky webbing fills a 20-foot cube, restraining those who fail to escape.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.description: Choose any creature, object, or magical effect. Any spell of 3rd level or lower ends.

spells.name: Counterspell
spells.description: You interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell.

spells.name: Fly
spells.description: You gain a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration.

spells.name: Slow
spells.description: Time seems to stop for up to 6 creatures. They move and act at half speed.

spells.name: Fear
spells.description: A phantasmal image of each creature's worst fears fills their mind.

spells.name: Animate Dead
spells.description: This spell creates an undead servant from a pile of bones or a corpse.

spells.name: Vampiric Touch
spells.description: Your touch deals necrotic damage and heals you for half the damage dealt.

spells.name: Wall of Fire
spells.description: A wall of fire blazes into existence on a solid surface.

spells.name: Polymorph
spells.description: This spell transforms a creature into a new form.

spells.name: Greater Invisibility
spells.description: You turn invisible and remain so even when you attack or cast spells.

spells.name: Banishment
spells.description: You attempt to send one creature to another plane of existence.

spells.name: Blight
spells.description: Necromantic energy washes over a creature, draining moisture and vitality.

spells.name: Telekinesis
spells.description: You gain the ability to move or manipulate creatures or objects with your mind.

spells.name: Hold Monster
spells.description: Choose a creature you can see. It must make a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed.

spells.name: Dominate Person
spells.description: You attempt to beguile a humanoid. It must make a Wisdom save or become charmed.

spells.name: Cloudkill
spells.description: A cloud of sickly yellow-green fog rolls out from a point you choose.

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.description: A protective magical force surrounds you, making you harder to hit.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out, dealing damage and knocking back enemies.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: You sense the presence of magic within 30 feet. You can see a faint aura.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.description: You attempt to charm a humanoid you can see. They regard you as a friendly acquaintance.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.description: This spell sends creatures into a magical slumber. Lowest HP targets sleep first.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.description: You extend your hand toward a creature and project a puff of noxious gas.

spells.name: False Life
spells.description: Bolstering yourself with dark magic, you gain temporary hit points.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to a visible spot.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.description: A sudden loud ringing noise, painfully intense, erupts from a point you choose.

spells.name: Spiritual Weapon
spells.description: You create a floating spectral weapon that attacks for you each round.

spells.name: Acid Arrow
spells.description: A shimmering green arrow streaks toward a target. On hit, deals acid damage now and next round.

spells.name: Blindness
spells.description: You attempt to blind a creature. It makes a Constitution save or is blinded.

spells.name: Confusion
spells.description: This spell assaults and twists creatures' minds, spawning delusions and provoking uncontrolled actions.

spells.name: Raise Dead
spells.description: You return a dead creature you touch to life, provided it has been dead no longer than 10 days.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.description: Lightning leaps from target to target, chaining to up to 3 additional creatures.

spells.name: Lesser Restoration
spells.description: You touch a creature and end one disease or condition afflicting it.

spells.name: Detect Thoughts
spells.description: You sense the surface thoughts of a creature in range.

spells.name: Barkskin
spells.description: Your skin becomes as hard as bark, increasing your defenses.

spells.name: Disguise Self
spells.description: You make yourselfâ€”including clothing, armor, weapons, and belongingsâ€”look different.

spells.name: Bestow Curse
spells.description: You curse a creature with a debilitating effect of your choice.

spells.name: Heroism
spells.description: A willing creature is imbued with bravery and temporary vitality.

spells.name: See Invisibility
spells.description: You can see invisible creatures and objects as if they were visible.

spells.name: Enlarge/Reduce
spells.description: You cause a creature or object to grow larger or smaller for a short time.

spells.name: Firebolt
spells.description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.description: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature within range.

spells.name: Spark
spells.description: A tiny arc of electricity leaps from your finger to a nearby target.

spells.name: Chromatic Orb
spells.description: You hurl a sphere of energy that you choose the damage type of upon casting.

spells.name: Witch Bolt
spells.description: A sustained arc of blue energy lances out toward a creature, dealing ongoing damage.

spells.name: Flame Blade
spells.description: You evoke a fiery blade in your free hand, ready to strike with searing heat.

spells.name: Gust of Wind
spells.description: A line of strong wind blasts from you, pushing creatures and dispersing gases.

spells.name: Erupting Earth
spells.description: The ground erupts violently, hurling stone and debris at creatures in the area.

spells.name: Storm Sphere
spells.description: A roiling sphere of wind and lightning materializes, lashing nearby foes.

spells.name: Dawn
spells.description: A column of brilliant radiance pours down from above, searing undead and shadow.

spells.name: Sunbeam
spells.description: A beam of brilliant light flashes out from your hand in a searing line.

spells.name: Prismatic Spray
spells.description: Seven multicolored rays of light flash from your hand, each with a devastating effect.

spells.name: Incendiary Cloud
spells.description: A roiling cloud of smoke and embers fills the area, burning all within.

spells.name: Sunburst
spells.description: Brilliant sunlight flashes in a 60-foot radius sphere, blinding and burning all.

spells.name: Meteor Swarm
spells.description: Four blazing orbs of fire streak across the sky and detonate in massive explosions.

spells.name: Delayed Blast Fireball
spells.description: A glowing bead of fire lodges at a point you choose and detonates after a delay.

spells.name: Frost Fingers
spells.description: Freezing cold blasts from your fingertips in a short cone.

spells.name: Radiant Burst
spells.description: A brilliant flash of holy light erupts in a sphere, searing dark creatures.

spells.name: Thunder Clap
spells.description: You clap your hands and release a devastating shockwave of thunder.

spells.name: Investiture of Flame
spells.description: Flames wreathe your body, granting fire immunity and the ability to hurl fire.

spells.name: Booming Blade
spells.description: Your weapon rings with thunderous energy that punishes movement.

spells.name: Force Cascade
spells.description: Waves of raw arcane force ripple outward, battering all caught in their path.

spells.name: Resistance
spells.description: You touch a willing creature, granting it a brief ward against harm.

spells.name: Blade Ward
spells.description: You trace a sigil of warding in the air, gaining brief resistance to weapon attacks.

spells.name: Sanctuary
spells.description: You ward a creature, and attackers must overcome the ward to strike.

spells.name: Protection from Evil
spells.description: A shimmering barrier protects a creature from aberrations, fiends, and undead.

spells.name: Warding Bond
spells.description: You create a mystic bond with a creature, sharing its pain and granting protection.

spells.name: Protection from Energy
spells.description: A creature you touch gains resistance to one elemental damage type.

spells.name: Remove Curse
spells.description: At your touch, all curses affecting one creature or object end.

spells.name: Death Ward
spells.description: You touch a creature and grant it a ward against death's embrace.

spells.name: Antilife Shell
spells.description: A shimmering barrier prevents living creatures from approaching you.

spells.name: Globe of Invulnerability
spells.description: An immobile shimmering sphere blocks spells of 5th level or lower cast from outside.

spells.name: Symbol of Warding
spells.description: You inscribe a harmful glyph that triggers when a creature enters its area.

spells.name: Holy Aura
spells.description: Divine light washes out from you in a 30-foot radius, protecting allies.

spells.name: Prismatic Wall
spells.description: A shimmering multicolored plane of light forms a wall, each layer with a different deadly effect.

spells.name: Greater Restoration
spells.description: You imbue a creature with positive energy to undo a debilitating effect.

spells.name: Abjure Enemy
spells.description: You utter a word of divine authority, forcing an enemy to halt and cower.

spells.name: Shield of Faith
spells.description: A shimmering field of divine energy surrounds a creature, boosting defenses.

spells.name: Absorb Elements
spells.description: You capture incoming elemental energy and channel it into your next melee strike.

spells.name: Mending
spells.description: This cantrip repairs a single break or tear in an object you touch.

spells.name: Thorn Whip
spells.description: You create a long vine-like whip covered in thorns that lashes out at a creature.

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.description: The wood of a club or staff you hold is imbued with nature's power.

spells.name: Feather Fall
spells.description: You slow the descent of falling creatures, letting them land safely.

spells.name: Jump
spells.description: A creature's jump distance is tripled for the duration.

spells.name: Longstrider
spells.description: You touch a creature and its speed increases by 10 feet.

spells.name: Heat Metal
spells.description: You cause a metal object to glow red-hot, burning any creature in contact with it.

spells.name: Spider Climb
spells.description: A creature you touch gains the ability to move along walls and ceilings.

spells.name: Gaseous Form
spells.description: You transform a willing creature into a misty cloud, able to pass through small gaps.

spells.name: Stone Shape
spells.description: You touch a stone object and form it into any shape that suits your purpose.

spells.name: Passwall
spells.description: A passage appears at a point you choose on a wooden, plaster, or stone surface.

spells.name: Flesh to Stone
spells.description: You attempt to turn one creature you can see to stone through petrification.

spells.name: Reverse Gravity
spells.description: You reverse gravity in a 50-foot radius cylinder, sending creatures and objects flying upward.

spells.name: Control Weather
spells.description: You take control of the weather within a 5-mile radius for the duration.

spells.name: Shapechange
spells.description: You assume the form of any creature, gaining its abilities and physical traits.

spells.name: Disintegrate
spells.description: A thin green ray springs from your finger, reducing a target to fine dust.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.description: A ghostly skeletal hand reaches out and assails a creature with the chill of the grave.

spells.name: Spare the Dying
spells.description: You touch a living creature that has 0 hit points, stabilizing it.

spells.name: Toll the Dead
spells.description: You point at a creature and the sound of a dolorous bell fills the air around it.

spells.name: Inflict Wounds
spells.description: You channel necrotic energy through your touch, withering flesh.

spells.name: Ray of Enfeeblement
spells.description: A black beam of enervating energy springs from your finger toward a creature.

spells.name: Gentle Repose
spells.description: You touch a corpse, protecting it from decay and preventing it from becoming undead.

spells.name: Speak with Dead
spells.description: You grant a semblance of life to a corpse, allowing it to answer questions.

spells.name: Enervation
spells.description: A tendril of dark energy issues from you, draining the life force of a creature.

spells.name: Create Undead
spells.description: You create a more powerful undead servant by imbuing a corpse with dark energy.

spells.name: Finger of Death
spells.description: You send negative energy coursing through a creature, causing searing pain.

spells.name: Soul Cage
spells.description: You trap the soul of a recently slain humanoid, harnessing its energy.

spells.name: Clone
spells.description: You grow an inert duplicate of a living creature as a failsafe against death.

spells.name: Power Word Kill
spells.description: You utter a word of power that can compel a creature with low vitality to die instantly.

spells.name: Wither and Bloom
spells.description: You drain vitality from one area and channel it to heal an ally nearby.

spells.name: Negative Energy Flood
spells.description: You send ribbons of negative energy at a creature, potentially slaying and raising it.

spells.name: Produce Flame
spells.description: A flickering flame appears in your hand, useful as light or as a weapon to hurl.

spells.name: Sword Burst
spells.description: You create a momentary circle of spectral blades that sweep around you.

spells.name: Infestation
spells.description: You cause a swarm of biting mites to appear momentarily on a creature.

spells.name: Grease
spells.description: Slick grease covers the ground in a 10-foot square, making creatures fall prone.

spells.name: Entangle
spells.description: Grasping weeds and vines sprout from the ground, restraining creatures in the area.

spells.name: Fog Cloud
spells.description: A 20-foot radius sphere of fog appears, heavily obscuring the area.

spells.name: Flaming Sphere
spells.description: A 5-foot diameter sphere of fire appears and rolls toward enemies each round.

spells.name: Stinking Cloud
spells.description: A roiling cloud of nauseating yellow gas fills the area, incapacitating creatures.

spells.name: Conjure Barrage
spells.description: You throw a projectile and hundreds of duplicates rain down in a wide cone.

spells.name: Black Tentacles
spells.description: Writhing black tentacles fill the area, bludgeoning and restraining creatures.

spells.name: Dimension Door
spells.description: You teleport yourself to any spot within range that you can visualize.

spells.name: Conjure Volley
spells.description: You fire a piece of ammunition into the air, creating a rain of duplicates.

spells.name: Wall of Thorns
spells.description: A wall of tough, pliable, tangled brush bristling with needle-sharp thorns springs into existence.

spells.name: Mordenkainen's Sword
spells.description: You create a sword-shaped plane of force that hovers and strikes at your command.

spells.name: Demiplane
spells.description: You create a shadowy door that opens to an empty extradimensional room.

spells.name: Gate
spells.description: You conjure a portal linking your plane to a different plane of existence.

spells.name: Insect Plague
spells.description: A swarm of biting locusts fills a 20-foot radius sphere, dealing piercing damage.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.description: You create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for one minute.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.description: A minor magical trick used for practice or entertainment.

spells.name: Silent Image
spells.description: You create the image of an object, creature, or visible phenomenon. It has no sound.

spells.name: Color Spray
spells.description: A dazzling array of flashing colors springs from your hand, blinding creatures.

spells.name: Blur
spells.description: Your body becomes blurred, wavering to all who can see you.

spells.name: Phantasmal Killer
spells.description: You tap into the nightmares of a creature, creating an illusory manifestation of its fears.

spells.name: Seeming
spells.description: You make a number of creatures look different for the duration.

spells.name: Programmed Illusion
spells.description: You craft an illusion that activates when a specific condition occurs.

spells.name: Project Image
spells.description: You create an illusory copy of yourself that appears at a location within range.

spells.name: Illusory Dragon
spells.description: You create an enormous shadowy illusion of a dragon that terrifies and damages foes.

spells.name: Weird
spells.description: Drawing on the deepest fears of a group, you create phantasmal horrors visible only to them.

spells.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spells.description: You conjure a twisting pattern of colors that weaves through the air, charming creatures.

spells.name: Hallucinatory Terrain
spells.description: You make terrain in a 150-foot cube look, sound, and smell like another natural terrain.

spells.name: Friends
spells.description: You magically emanate a sense of friendship toward a creature.

spells.name: Vicious Mockery
spells.description: You unleash a string of insults laced with subtle enchantments at a creature.

spells.name: Command
spells.description: You speak a one-word command to a creature, which it must obey on its next turn.

spells.name: Calm Emotions
spells.description: You suppress strong emotions in a group of creatures, calming hostility or fear.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.description: You suggest a course of activity to a creature, which it pursues to the best of its ability.

spells.name: Compulsion
spells.description: Creatures you choose must move in a direction you designate before taking actions.

spells.name: Geas
spells.description: You place a magical command on a creature, forcing it to carry out some service.

spells.name: Mass Suggestion
spells.description: You suggest a course of activity to up to twelve creatures that you can see.

spells.name: Feeblemind
spells.description: You blast the mind of a creature, attempting to shatter its intellect and personality.

spells.name: Power Word Stun
spells.description: You speak a word of power that can overwhelm the mind of a creature, stunning it.

spells.name: Psychic Scream
spells.description: You unleash a wave of devastating psychic energy that shatters minds.

spells.name: Enthrall
spells.description: You weave a distracting string of words, causing those who hear to focus entirely on you.

spells.name: Modify Memory
spells.description: You attempt to reshape another creature's memories of an event.

spells.name: Guidance
spells.description: You touch a creature and grant it divine guidance on its next ability check.

spells.name: True Strike
spells.description: You point at a target and briefly perceive the ideal moment to strike.

spells.name: Identify
spells.description: You touch an object and learn its properties, how to use it, and any spells affecting it.

spells.name: Hunter's Mark
spells.description: You choose a creature and mystically mark it as your quarry.

spells.name: Augury
spells.description: You receive an omen about the results of a specific course of action.

spells.name: Clairvoyance
spells.description: You create an invisible sensor in a location you are familiar with.

spells.name: Divination
spells.description: Your magic puts you in contact with a divine entity, who answers one question.

spells.name: Scrying
spells.description: You can see and hear a particular creature of your choice on the same plane.

spells.name: True Seeing
spells.description: A creature you touch gains truesight, seeing through illusions and into the ethereal.

spells.name: Legend Lore
spells.description: You learn significant lore about a person, place, or object of legendary importance.

spells.name: Mind Blank
spells.description: A creature you touch is immune to psychic damage, divination, and charm effects.

spells.name: Foresight
spells.description: You touch a creature and it gains an uncanny ability to see the immediate future.

spells.name: Locate Creature
spells.description: You sense the direction to a creature you are familiar with, if within 1000 feet.

spells.name: Temporal Flicker
spells.description: You briefly phase in and out of the timestream, becoming harder to hit for an instant.

spells.name: Chrono Jolt
spells.description: You hurl a shard of displaced time at a creature, stinging it with temporal energy.

spells.name: Hasten Step
spells.description: You briefly accelerate your personal timeflow, moving faster than normal.

spells.name: Slow Time
spells.description: You decelerate a creature's personal time, making its movements sluggish.

spells.name: Temporal Shield
spells.description: A faint shimmer of distorted time wraps around you, deflecting incoming blows.

spells.name: Time Slip
spells.description: You briefly skip a creature forward in time, causing it to vanish and reappear.

spells.name: Borrowed Time
spells.description: You steal vitality from your future self, gaining temporary hit points now.

spells.name: Aging Touch
spells.description: You accelerate time for a creature you touch, rapidly aging its body.

spells.name: Rewind Wound
spells.description: You reverse time on an ally's injuries, undoing recently suffered wounds.

spells.name: Temporal Anchor
spells.description: You anchor yourself to this moment in time, and can snap back to it if harmed.

spells.name: Chrono Bolt
spells.description: A bolt of concentrated temporal energy strikes a creature, disrupting its timeline.

spells.name: Stasis Field
spells.description: You freeze a creature in a bubble of stopped time. It cannot act or be harmed.

spells.name: Temporal Rift
spells.description: You tear open a rift in time, buffeting creatures with chaotic temporal energies.

spells.name: Accelerate Ally
spells.description: You speed up an ally's timestream so greatly they can take an extra action.

spells.name: Age Storm
spells.description: A swirling vortex of time energy ravages an area, aging and withering all within.

spells.name: Temporal Prison
spells.description: You imprison a creature in a tiny sphere of frozen time, trapping it completely.

spells.name: Chronostrike
spells.description: You strike a creature with a focused beam that ruptures its personal timeline.

spells.name: Rewrite History
spells.description: You reach back through time and alter a recent event, changing its outcome.

spells.name: Temporal Cascade
spells.description: Time fractures in a massive area, dealing devastating temporal damage to all caught within.

spells.name: Time Stop
spells.description: You briefly stop the flow of time for all creatures except yourself.

spells.name: Paradox Unraveling
spells.description: You unravel the temporal fabric around a creature, causing paradoxical harm.

spells.name: DÃ©jÃ  Vu
spells.description: You force a creature to re-experience a painful moment, stunning it briefly.

spells.name: Temporal Echo
spells.description: You summon an echo of yourself from a moment ago to fight alongside you.

spells.name: Moment of Prescience
spells.description: You peer a few seconds into the future, gaining perfect foresight in combat.

spells.name: Searing Smite
spells.description: Your weapon flares with white-hot intensity, adding fire damage to your strike.

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.description: You point your finger and the creature that damaged you is engulfed in hellish flames.

spells.name: Aganazzar's Scorcher
spells.description: A jet of roaring flame sprays out in a line, scorching everything in its path.

spells.name: Snilloc's Snowball Swarm
spells.description: A flurry of magic snowballs erupts, pelting creatures with frigid impacts.

spells.name: Spirit Guardians
spells.description: Spectral warriors orbit you, striking at hostile creatures that come too close.

spells.name: Vitriolic Sphere
spells.description: You hurl a glowing green orb that bursts into a splash of acid on impact.

spells.name: Destructive Wave
spells.description: You strike the ground, creating a burst of divine energy that ripples outward.

spells.name: Otiluke's Freezing Sphere
spells.description: A frigid globe of cold energy streaks to a point and explodes in a 60-foot radius.

spells.name: Fire Storm
spells.description: A storm of roaring flame appears in multiple designated areas, burning selectively.

spells.name: Dispel Evil and Good
spells.description: Shimmering energy surrounds and protects you from fey, undead, and fiends.

spells.name: Arcane Lock
spells.description: You touch a closed door, window, gate, or chest and it becomes magically locked.

spells.name: Nondetection
spells.description: You hide a target from divination magic for 8 hours.

spells.name: Fire Shield
spells.description: Thin flickering flames wreathe your body, granting resistance and retaliatory damage.

spells.name: Forbiddance
spells.description: You create a ward against magical travel that also damages certain creature types.

spells.name: Regenerate
spells.description: You touch a creature and stimulate its natural healing, restoring vitality over time.

spells.name: Antimagic Field
spells.description: A 10-foot radius invisible sphere of antimagic surrounds you, suppressing all magic.

spells.name: Water Breathing
spells.description: You grant up to ten willing creatures the ability to breathe underwater.

spells.name: Alter Self
spells.description: You assume a different form, gaining natural weapons, aquatic adaptation, or disguise.

spells.name: Catapult
spells.description: You choose an unattended object and magically fling it at a creature.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.description: One creature or object rises vertically up to 20 feet and remains suspended.

spells.name: Etherealness
spells.description: You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane, becoming ghostlike.

spells.name: True Polymorph
spells.description: You transform a creature into another creature or object permanently.

spells.name: Circle of Death
spells.description: A sphere of negative energy ripples out, dealing necrotic damage to all living creatures within.

spells.name: Harm
spells.description: You unleash a virulent disease on a creature, reducing its hit point maximum.

spells.name: Eyebite
spells.description: Your eyes become pools of darkness, cursing a creature each round with sleep, panic, or sickness.

spells.name: Abi-Dalzim's Horrid Wilting
spells.description: You draw the moisture from every creature in a 30-foot cube, causing devastating pain.

spells.name: Astral Projection
spells.description: You project your astral body into the astral plane, leaving your physical body behind.

spells.name: Contagion
spells.description: Your touch inflicts disease on a creature, poisoning it with a terrible plague.

spells.name: Tsunami
spells.description: A wall of water springs into existence, crashing forward and sweeping away everything.

spells.name: Conjure Elemental
spells.description: You call forth an elemental servant from the corresponding elemental plane.

spells.name: Create Food and Water
spells.description: You create enough food and water to sustain up to fifteen humanoids for a day.

spells.name: Unseen Servant
spells.description: An invisible, mindless, shapeless force performs simple tasks at your command.

spells.name: Find Familiar
spells.description: You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an animal form you choose.

spells.name: Sleet Storm
spells.description: Freezing rain and sleet fall in a 20-foot radius, creating difficult terrain.

spells.name: Arcane Gate
spells.description: You create linked teleportation portals at two points within range.

spells.name: Conjure Fey
spells.description: You summon a fey creature to serve and fight for you.

spells.name: Plane Shift
spells.description: You transport yourself and up to eight creatures to a different plane of existence.

spells.name: Maze
spells.description: You banish a creature into a labyrinthine demiplane, trapping it.

spells.name: Creation
spells.description: You pull wisps of shadow material to create a nonliving object of vegetable or mineral matter.

spells.name: Phantom Steed
spells.description: A quasi-real horse-like creature appears, serving as a swift mount.

spells.name: Major Image
spells.description: You create the image of an object, creature, or phenomenon with sound, smell, and temperature.

spells.name: Shadow Blade
spells.description: You weave together threads of shadow to create a blade of solidified gloom.

spells.name: Nathair's Mischief
spells.description: You fill a cube with fey mischief: blinding light, charming scents, or other tricks.

spells.name: Mirage Arcane
spells.description: You make terrain in an area up to one mile square look, sound, and smell like other terrain.

spells.name: Mental Prison
spells.description: You attempt to bind a creature within an illusory cell that it perceives as deadly.

spells.name: Antipathy/Sympathy
spells.description: You target an object or area with an aura that attracts or repels specified creatures.

spells.name: Dominate Monster
spells.description: You attempt to beguile a creature, which must make a Wisdom save or become your puppet.

spells.name: Crown of Madness
spells.description: A twisted crown of jagged iron appears on a humanoid's head, driving it to attack allies.

spells.name: Irresistible Dance
spells.description: You compel a creature to begin dancing, capering, and shuffling its feet.

spells.name: Synaptic Static
spells.description: You cause psychic energy to erupt at a point, scrambling the thoughts of creatures.

spells.name: Zone of Truth
spells.description: You create a magical zone where creatures cannot speak a deliberate lie.

spells.name: Tongues
spells.description: A creature you touch gains the ability to understand and speak any language.

spells.name: Commune
spells.description: You contact your deity or a divine proxy and ask up to three yes-or-no questions.

spells.name: Contact Other Plane
spells.description: You mentally contact a demigod or the spirit of a sage from another plane.

spells.name: Arcane Eye
spells.description: You create an invisible, magical eye that hovers in the air and scouts for you.

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.description: For the duration, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken language.

spells.name: Find Traps
spells.description: You sense the presence of any trap within line of sight.

spells.name: Rary's Telepathic Bond
spells.description: You forge a telepathic link among up to eight willing creatures.

spells.name: Divination Sigil
spells.description: You mark a surface with a glowing sigil that reveals the last creature to touch it.

spells.name: Mass Heal
spells.description: A flood of healing energy flows from you into injured creatures around you.

spells.name: Thunder Step
spells.description: You teleport to a visible unoccupied space, and a thunderclap erupts where you stood.

spells.name: Scatter
spells.description: You teleport up to five creatures you can see to unoccupied spaces you choose.

spells.name: Mordenkainen's Magnificent Mansion
spells.description: You conjure an extradimensional dwelling with lavish accommodations and invisible servants.

spells.name: Telepathy
spells.description: You create a telepathic link with a willing creature anywhere on the same plane.

spells.name: Hunger of Hadar
spells.description: You open a gateway to the void between the stars, a region of cold darkness.

spells.name: Eldritch Smite
spells.description: Your weapon flares with eldritch power, delivering a devastating blast of force.

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature, granting advantage on the next attack against it.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.description: You speak a word of healing power, mending an ally's wounds from a distance.

spells.name: Aura of Vitality
spells.description: A healing aura radiates from you, allowing you to restore hit points to nearby allies each round.

spells.name: Warding Wind
spells.description: Strong wind swirls around you, deflecting ranged attacks and dispersing gases.

spells.name: Wind Wall
spells.description: A wall of strong wind rises from the ground, deflecting arrows and small creatures.

spells.name: Maelstrom
spells.description: A churning mass of water appears, pulling creatures toward its center.

spells.name: Immolation
spells.description: Flames wreathe a creature, burning it continuously until the spell ends.

spells.name: Bones of the Earth
spells.description: You cause up to six pillars of stone to burst from the ground, potentially trapping creatures.

spells.name: Move Earth
spells.description: You reshape dirt, sand, or clay in a 40-foot cube, creating trenches or raising terrain.

spells.name: Fabricate
spells.description: You convert raw materials into products of the same material.

spells.name: Transmute Rock
spells.description: You choose an area of rock and transform it into mud, or vice versa.

spells.name: Animal Shapes
spells.description: You transform up to ten willing creatures into beasts of your choice.

spells.name: Mass Polymorph
spells.description: You transform up to ten creatures into new forms of your choosing.

spells.name: Slow Decay
spells.description: You slow the progress of a poison or disease in a creature, buying time for a cure.

spells.name: Life Transference
spells.description: You sacrifice some of your own vitality to mend another creature's injuries.

spells.name: Danse Macabre
spells.description: You reanimate up to five corpses to serve as undead warriors under your command.

spells.name: Soul Jar
spells.description: You trap your soul in a specially prepared container, gaining lichlike resilience.

spells.name: Phantom Fog
spells.description: You create a bank of illusory fog that creatures believe is real.

spells.name: Simulacrum
spells.description: You shape an illusory duplicate of a beast or humanoid made partly of ice and snow.

spells.name: Creation of Thralls
spells.description: You place a charm upon a creature, binding it to serve your will in combat.

spells.name: Intellect Fortress
spells.description: You create a barrier of psychic energy around allies, granting resistance to psychic damage.

spells.name: Catnap
spells.description: You make up to three willing creatures fall unconscious for a brief restorative sleep.

spells.name: Hex
spells.description: You place a curse on a creature, dealing extra necrotic damage when you hit it.

spells.name: Tasha's Hideous Laughter
spells.description: A creature perceives everything as hilariously funny and falls into fits of laughter.

spells.name: Tasha's Mind Whip
spells.description: You psychically lash out at a creature, disrupting its ability to act.

spells.name: Rime's Binding Ice
spells.description: A burst of rime spreads from you in a cone, freezing and restraining creatures.

spells.name: Tidal Wave
spells.description: You conjure up a wave of water that crashes down on an area, sweeping creatures away.

spells.name: Watery Sphere
spells.description: You conjure a sphere of water that can engulf and restrain creatures inside it.

spells.name: Steel Wind Strike
spells.description: You flourish a weapon and vanish, striking up to five creatures with wind-quick blows.

spells.name: Temporal Reverberation
spells.description: You cause a creature to experience the same injury twice as time echoes back on itself.

spells.name: Chronal Disruption
spells.description: You shatter the timestream in an area, causing creatures to age and de-age wildly.

spells.name: Ray of Sickness
spells.description: A ray of sickening greenish energy lashes out toward a creature.

spells.name: Shadow of Moil
spells.description: Threads of dark shadow wrap around you, dealing necrotic damage to those who strike you.

spells.name: Spirit Shroud
spells.description: Spirits of the dead surround you, adding necrotic damage to your strikes.

spells.name: Summon Undead
spells.description: You call forth a spirit of undeath that manifests as a ghostly, putrid, or skeletal form.

spells.name: Summon Fey
spells.description: You call forth a fey spirit that takes on a tricksy, fuming, or mirthful form.

spells.name: Armor of Agathys
spells.description: A protective magical force surrounds you in a coat of spectral frost.

spells.name: Motivational Speech
spells.description: You give an inspiring speech that bolsters up to five allies with temporary vitality.

spells.name: Gift of Alacrity
spells.description: You touch a creature and quicken its reflexes, adding a burst of temporal speed.

spells.name: Fortune's Favor
spells.description: You grant a creature a shard of future luck, letting it reroll a failed check.

spells.name: Wristpocket
spells.description: You flick an object into an extratemporal pocket, storing it outside normal time.

spells.name: Pulse Wave
spells.description: A wave of temporal force blasts from you, pushing or pulling creatures caught in it.

spells.name: Gravity Sinkhole
spells.description: You create a localized point of intense gravity that pulls creatures toward its center.

spells.name: Temporal Shunt
spells.description: You push a creature moments into the future, causing it to vanish temporarily.

spells.name: Reality Break
spells.description: You shatter the fabric of reality around a creature, subjecting it to random temporal effects.

spells.name: Tether Essence
spells.description: You link two creatures' timelines so that damage to one echoes onto the other.

spells.name: Plant Growth
spells.description: Plants in the area grow thick and overgrown, turning the terrain into difficult ground.

spells.name: Elemental Weapon
spells.description: A weapon you touch becomes infused with elemental energy, granting bonus damage.

spells.name: Magic Weapon
spells.description: You touch a nonmagical weapon and it becomes magical with a bonus to attack and damage.

spells.name: Investiture of Ice
spells.description: Icy rime covers your body, granting cold immunity and a freezing ground aura.

spells.name: Whirlwind
spells.description: A raging whirlwind appears at a point you designate, hurling creatures skyward.

spells.name: Crown of Stars
spells.description: Seven star-like motes of light orbit your head. You can send them streaking at foes.

spells.name: Illusory Script
spells.description: You write on parchment or another surface and imbue it with an illusion.

spells.name: Enemies Abound
spells.description: You reach into a creature's mind and make it perceive all other creatures as enemies.

spells.name: Phantasmal Force
spells.description: You craft an illusion that takes root in a creature's mind, causing perceived damage.

spells.name: Wail of the Banshee
spells.description: You release a terrible scream of death that drains the life from all who hear it.

spells.name: Witch's Cauldron
spells.description: You conjure a bubbling cauldron of foul liquid that splashes and poisons nearby creatures.

spells.name: Dawn of the Temporal Tide
spells.description: You unleash a tidal wave of raw time energy that rips through the fabric of reality.

spells.name: Prayer of Healing
spells.description: Up to six creatures of your choice regain hit points as you lead a healing prayer.

spells.name: Aid
spells.description: Your spell bolsters allies, increasing their hit point maximum and current hit points.

spells.name: Beacon of Hope
spells.description: You bestow hope among allies, maximizing healing received and granting advantage on death saves.

spells.name: Revivify
spells.description: You touch a creature that has died within the last minute, returning it to life with 1 hit point.

spells.name: Guardian of Faith
spells.description: A Large spectral guardian appears and strikes at creatures that approach it.

spells.name: Planar Binding
spells.description: You attempt to bind a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to your service.

spells.name: Blade Barrier
spells.description: You create a vertical wall of spinning blades made of magical energy.

spells.name: Heal
spells.description: You channel a massive surge of positive energy into a creature, restoring vitality.

spells.name: Resurrection
spells.description: You touch a dead creature that has been dead for no more than a century, restoring it to life.

spells.name: True Resurrection
spells.description: You restore a creature to life even if no body remains, provided you know its name.

spells.name: Meld into Stone
spells.description: You step into a stone object large enough to contain you, merging with it for safety.

spells.name: Freedom of Movement
spells.description: You touch a willing creature. Its movement is unaffected by difficult terrain or restraints.

spells.name: Wish
spells.description: The mightiest spell a mortal creature can cast. State your wish and reality reshapes.

spells.name: Power Word Heal
spells.description: You speak a word of power that heals a creature to its full hit points instantly.
